title: Mailing Address include zip code
excerpt: When typing in a mailing address, please include the zip code. Currently it goes 123 Main Ave, City, CA, USA.

posts.author: PCSTheater (Theater Manager)
posts.cookedHtml: When typing in a mailing address, please include the zip code. Currently it goes 123 Main Ave, City, CA, USA.

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to have the zip code included in the address verification. Currently, I added a separate field for the zip code, but it is extra work to find it and then enter it.

posts.author: EG_TGR (Eric)
posts.cookedHtml: Resurfacing this! Just noticed it didn’t do this. Not sure why it wouldn’t show since it references a database which probably also includes.

posts.author: dgp66 (Doug Pawl)
posts.cookedHtml: This seems like a no-brainer. Monday.com - why hasn’t this been implemented yet?

posts.author: DelBocaVista (Marty Fishdog)
posts.cookedHtml: We’ve had issues with this as well and I’ve discovered you can get the zip code to appear by typing the first number of the zip code…if you know it. The remaining digits will populate.
